title: anabasis calcarea
intro: Anabasis calcarea, also known as sea purslane, is a succulent perennial plant native to the coastal regions of Europe, Asia, and Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Anabasis calcarea include soothing digestive issues such as diarrhea and inflammation, as well as reducing symptoms of acne and other skin conditions. Anabasis calcarea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with some traditional uses also incorporating the plant in creams and salves for topical application.
